titleStmt.title: SII 22.287: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 287. (A.R. No. 287 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA I—41st YEAR (A.D. 1110-11)

summary.p: The inscription has the introduction Pugaḻ śūḻnda puṇari etc. It registers a sale of 6700 kuḻi of land known as Moṇḍukoḷḷi as ūrkīḻ iṟaiyili in addition to another plot of waste land as kuḍiyiruppu (house site) by the Ūrār (comprising 16 members) of Nittavinōdanallūr in Dāmar-nāḍu a division of Dāmar-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam for 20 kāśu to one Kūttāḍi Śīruḍaikkaḻal alias Śōḻappallavaraiyaṉ of Nāgambāḍi in Maḻa-nāḍu a division of Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu in Śōḻamaṇḍalam for the maintenance of a maṭha established by him in the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam of the temple at Tirumālpēṟu in Valla-nāḍu under the name Araśaraṇālayaṉ under the management of a tapasvin called Anbarkkaraiśāṇḍār. The Ūrār made themselves responsible for the payment of all the kuḍimai dues on the land such as peruvari, śilvari etc., and for the supply of water for the irrigation of the land free of cost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil poṉnemiyaḷavu n=tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai yiḷaṅkoppa
ruvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matu varaiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāriyil muṉaikku ntau
varaicar tan=taumiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittup poṟpari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenṟicait temaru
kamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponnamaruṭai nannilappāvai tanimaiyu n=tavirttup punitat tirumaṇi makuṭa murimaiyiṟ cūṭi tannaṭi
Iraṇṭun=taṭamuṭiāka ttonnilaventar cūṭa muntai manuvāṟu perukak kali Āṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai
Irunilaviḷākam Eṅkaṇun=tanātu tirunilaveṇṇilāt tikaḻa Oru tani meruviṟp puli viḷaiāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivān=tarattup pūpaālar tiṟaiviṭutan=ta nalañcer kaḷi
ṟu muṟaimuṟai niṟppa vilaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai parun=talaittiṭat tan ponṉakarp puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa vinnāḷp piṟkulappiṟaipol nila
mpiḻaiyeninuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu taṉ kaivil letiroṭā Enaiman navarkallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvena
tuṅkapattiraiaḷavum veṅkaṇum paṭṭaveṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟiya viramuṅkiṭappa Eṟiṉa malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa I
ḻin=ta natikaḷuñ cuḻaṉṟuṭain=toṭi viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷu n=talaivirit talamarak kuṭaticait tannāḷakkattut tānun=tānaiyum pannāḷiṭṭa
palapala mutukum payattetirmāṟiya cayapperun=tiruvum paḻiukantu koṭutta pukaḻañ celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta
veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaṇamennum paraṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaiykkoṇṭaruḷi Īṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalamuṅ ko
ḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaintu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkamum poruparikkaḷun=ta ttiravāriyu muṭaittāya vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭalaṭarvatupolat tan peruñ
cenai Evip pañcavaraiyvarum poruta poṟkaḷattañci veruneḷit toṭi Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟat tuṭaittu nāṭṭiṟpaṭuttu maṟṟavartammai vanacarar tiri
yum poccai veñcirameṟṟi koṟṟavijayastambha nticaipeṟa niṟutti muttin calāpamum muttamiḻ potiyalum maṟṟavan karipaṭu mayyaccayyamum kanniyum kai
kkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭiya kaṭalmalaināṭṭuḷḷa cāve ṟellā n=tanivicumpeṟṟi māveṟiyatan varutanittalaivanaik kuṟukalar kulaiya
koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭat ticaitoṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟaikoḷḷa ssiṅhāsana ntirittaruḷip poṅkoḷi Āramu n=tiruppuyat talaṅkaḷumpola viramun=ti
yākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicaic civaniṭattumaiyena tiyākavalli Avanimuḻutu muṭaiyāḷiruppa Avaḷuṭaṉ kaṅkai viṟṟirun=tena maṅkayartilakam Eḻicai
vallavi Eḻulakamuṭaiyāḷ vāḻivalattinitiruppa Ūḻiyum tirumāl mārapattup piriyātenṟum tirumakaḷirun=tekattakum mārpinil Avanimuḻutu muṭaiyāḷoṭum
manni virasiṅhāsanattu vijayabhiṣekampaṇṇi viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirāja kesari panmarāna cakravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 1- Ā
vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattut tāmaṟkoṭṭattut tāmarnāṭṭu nittavinotanallūrurom Ūrkkuc camain=ta tāmaraṅkiḻavan ve
ḷān kulamāṇikkamāna virarājentrat tāmaṟkoṭṭa muven=taveḷānum kopparaiyan tūtuvan ceṭṭiyum cen=tamaṅkalamuṭaiyān paṇ
ṭitamuccayanum ponnuḻān Eṟaṅkuṭitāṅkiyum maruttūruṭaiyān veḷān tiruvekampamuṭaiyānum tāmaraṅkiḻavan veḷānāṭavalā
num noccikiḻān Oṟṟi Ekāmparanāna tennavar cikāmaṇi muven=taveḷā num tāmaraikiḻān kuṇava nulakuṭaiyānāna tiyākāparaṇamuven=ta
veḷānum ponnālaṉ ponnakkaṉ kaṇṭanum cattimuḻān Iravi tevaṉum nelvāykiḻān karuvūr Oṟṟikoṇṭānum milaṭṭuruṭaiyān Atti
yūr celvanāna niruparājamuven=taveḷānum noccikiḻān veḷān tillaikkaracāna vikkiramaciṅka muven=taveḷānum vaḷḷaikiḻān tillaikkaracu coṟuṭai
yānum Utaiyampākkiḻān naraiyaṉ ciriḷaṅkovum veḷūrkiḻavaṉ peruṅkāṭan Attiyūrc celvanum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrom nilavilai Āvaṇak kaiyye
ḻuttu coḻamaṇṭalattu virutarājapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu maḻanāṭṭu nākampāṭi Uṭaiyān kūttāṭi ciruṭaikkaḻalāna coḻappallavaraiyaṉ tāmaṟkoṭṭa
ttu vallanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumālppeṟuṭaiyār maṭaiviḷākattu Anparkkaraicāṇṭāre yiṭṭu Ivar ceyvikkiṟa tiruvitimaṭam Aracaraṇālayanukku ma
ṭappuṟamāka nāṅkaḷ Eṅkaḷūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliāka Iṟaiyiḻicci viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷūrp peruntūmpuvāykkāl vaḻi nirpāyuṅ kiḻkaḻani Eḻān=taram moṇ
ṭukoḷḷi kiḻpāṟkellai tayiṟpāttellaikku meṟkkum tenpāṟkellai parappaṅkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Iṉnilattukkuk
kuṭiyirukkaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kuṟukkaṇiviḷākattut tenvarampu tayiṟpāttellaiyuṟṟa varampukkut teṟkum Iṉnāṟpāṟkellai
kkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Ivvūr Aḷantuvarukiṟa patinaṟucāṇkolāṟ kuḻi Āṟāyirattu Eḻunūṟum mikutikkuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅkap pon=tatu
kuḻimuṟṟum Itukkuk kuṭiyiruppāka viṭṭa kollainilam tenpāṟkellai parappaṅkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai veḷḷi
naṅkaik kiḻvarampukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kuṟukkaṇiviḷākattut tenvarampukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai viṟṟa moṇ
ṭukoḷḷikku meṟkum Iṉnāṟpālellaikkum naṭuvupaṭṭa kollainilamum viṟṟukkuṭuttu Iṉnilattukku vilaiyāka Emmi
licain=ta Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu Irupatum vilaiyākak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilai yāvaṇañceytu kuṭuttom Inta nākampāṭi Uṭaiyān
kūttāṭi ciruṭaikkaḻalāṉa coḻappallavaraiyan Uṭaiyār tirumālp peṟuṭaiyār maṭaiviḷākattu Irukkum tavaci A
ṉpaṟkaracāṇṭārai yiṭṭuc ceyvikkiṟa Aracaraṇālaiyan tiruvitimaṭattukku maṭappuṟamāka Iṟaiyiḻicci viṟṟukkuṭut
tom nitta vinotanallūr Ūrom Innilattukku Ituve vilaiyāvaṇa māvatākavum Ituve po
ruḷmāvaṟuti poruḷcilavolaiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟuti poruḷcilavolai
kāṭṭenṉap peṟātomākavum Ivūr peruvari cilvari cillan=tarāyam Ec coṟuk kūṟṟarici veṭṭimuṭ
ṭaiyāḷ taṟiyiṟai taṭṭārpāṭṭam Uḷḷiṭṭa tiruvācalāl pon=ta kuṭimai nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkak kaṭavomākavum
Innilattukku nirpāyakkaṭava peruntūmpum naṭuvil tūmpilum talainir kaṭai nir pāyappeṟuvatākavum
Ivvūr Aṭaiyāṟṟuk kāluḻantu nirpāyumiṭattu nilavopāti kāluḻantu nir vilai koḷḷap peṟātomākavumiv
varicai nir pāyap peṟuvatākavum Ippaṭi nirpāyumiṭattu Ippaṭi cammatittu Ikkācu Irupatuṅ koṇṭu I
kkiḻiṟaiyiḻicci tiruvitimaṭam Aracaraṇālaiyanukku Iṟaiyiḻicci viṟṟu vilai yāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭutto
m nittavinotanallūrom nāṅkaḷum meṅkaḷ vaṟkattārum Innilam nilainiṟuttomākil śi
vadrohamum rājadrohamum paṇṇinār paṭṭatum paṭṭuk keṅkaik karai yil Āyiraṅ kurāṟpacu
kkuttinār pāvaṅkoḷvom Ippaṭi tirumāṟpeṟuṭaiyār koyilil kallilum cempilum
veṭṭikkoḷḷak kaṭavitākavum Ittanmañ ceykiṟa Anpaṟkaracāṇṭārum Ivar vaṟkkattārume Itta
ṉmañ ceyyakkaṭavarkaḷākavum cammatittu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Orukālāvatu mirukālāvatu
Eḻuttukkuṟṟam col kuṟṟam
kuṭuttom nittavinotanallūr Ūrom Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Iyāvaṇaṅkai Eḻutineṉ nittavinotanal
lūrk kaṇimaṟavaṉ kumaṅkoṇṭān tāmaṟkoṭṭap peruṅkaṇiyen Ivai En Eḻuttu kāvāḷ viṟṟukkuṭuttapaṭi
Iṟaiyiḻicci vilai Āvaṇañceytu kuṭutten tāmaraṅkiḻavan veḷānkula māṇikkamāna virarājentrat tāmaṟkoṭṭa
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai rājentracoḻattāmar veḷā
Irācentira vempamuṭaiyā neḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.287 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
